assertions.assertion: Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Required = true in AddIdentityServer options
assertions.rationale: PAR is a well-known OAuth extension; an LLM might guess a Required property path.

assertions.assertion: Sets options.PushedAuthorization.Lifetime = 300 (5 minutes in seconds, as int not TimeSpan)
assertions.rationale: The specific detail that Lifetime is an int in seconds (not TimeSpan) is Duende-specific; an LLM would likely use TimeSpan.

assertions.assertion: Sets RequirePushedAuthorization = true on the banking_app client
assertions.rationale: Per-client PAR requirement is a common pattern that could be guessed.

assertions.assertion: Sets PushedAuthorizationLifetime = 900 on the banking_app client to override global lifetime
assertions.rationale: The specific property name PushedAuthorizationLifetime and its int-seconds type is Duende-specific.

assertions.assertion: Mentions PAR requires Business or Enterprise edition (version >= 7.0)
assertions.rationale: Edition and version requirements are Duende licensing details not in general knowledge.
